name: Chinese Beef with Cashews
recipeIngredient: 1 Piece fresh ginger root, peeled and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove any visible fat from the beef rump steak. Cut the meat across the grain into thin slices, approximately 2 inches long.
2. Heat 2 tablespoons of vegetable oil in a wok over high heat. Stir-fry half of the sliced meat until browned, about 3 to 5 minutes. Remove the cooked meat from the wok and set aside. Cook the remaining meat separately and remove it once done.
3. Chop the green onions into 1-inch pieces.
4. Heat the remaining 2 tablespoons of vegetable oil in the wok over high heat. Add the chopped green onions, crushed garlic, and finely chopped ginger. Stir-fry for about 1 minute.
5. Add the cashews to the wok and stir-fry until lightly golden, about 1 minute.
6. Mix the cooked meat back into the cashew-green onion mixture.
7. Combine all remaining ingredients (water, cornstarch, soy sauce, sesame oil, oyster sauce, and Chinese chili sauce) in a bowl until well mixed.
8. Pour the combined liquid over the meat mixture and stir until the liquid boils and thickens.
